name: British Gas
description: One of the UK's largest energy suppliers, providing gas, electricity, and home services to millions of households.

name: EDF Energy
description: A leading UK energy supplier backed by one of the world's largest electricity generators, offering competitive fixed and variable tariffs.

name: Octopus Energy
description: Award-winning energy supplier known for green energy, innovative tariffs, and outstanding customer service.

name: Ovo Energy
description: Independent energy supplier committed to sustainability, offering simple, affordable energy plans with a focus on green initiatives.

name: E.ON Next
description: The next generation of E.ON, offering 100% renewable electricity as standard and a range of smart energy tariffs.

name: Scottish Power
description: Major UK energy supplier and the first integrated energy company to generate 100% green electricity.

name: Shell Energy
description: Energy supplier offering broadband bundles alongside 100% renewable electricity plans and smart home solutions.

name: Bulb Energy
description: Simple, affordable green energy supplier offering 100% renewable electricity and carbon-offset gas.

name: BT
description: The UK's largest broadband and telecoms provider, offering fibre broadband, TV, and mobile services nationwide.

name: Sky
description: Leading entertainment and broadband provider offering superfast fibre, Sky TV packages, and mobile plans.

name: Virgin Media
description: Major broadband and TV provider offering ultrafast Gig1 fibre speeds up to 1130Mbps on its own cable network.

name: TalkTalk
description: Budget-friendly broadband provider offering affordable fibre and full fibre packages across the UK.

name: Plusnet
description: Award-winning broadband provider known for straightforward pricing, reliable service, and Yorkshire-based customer support.

name: Vodafone
description: Global telecoms giant offering mobile, broadband, and converged services with extensive 4G and growing 5G coverage across the UK.

name: EE
description: The UK's largest mobile network with the widest 5G coverage, also offering fibre broadband and Smart Hub plans.

name: Three
description: Mobile network operator offering competitive data plans, 5G home broadband, and unlimited data options.

name: O2
description: Major UK mobile network offering flexible plans, Priority rewards, and reliable nationwide coverage.

name: giffgaff
description: Community-driven mobile network running on O2, offering flexible SIM-only goodybags with no contract commitments.

name: VOXI
description: Vodafone-powered mobile network aimed at younger users, featuring endless social media and video streaming data.

name: iD Mobile
description: Budget mobile network on Three's network, offering data rollover, bill capping, and affordable SIM-only deals.

name: Admiral
description: One of the UK's leading car insurance providers, also offering home, pet, and travel insurance products.

name: Direct Line
description: Well-known UK insurer offering car, home, pet, and travel insurance with a direct-to-consumer model.

name: Aviva
description: One of the UK's largest insurance and financial services providers, covering car, home, life, and health insurance.

name: Churchill
description: Popular UK insurer offering comprehensive car, home, pet, and travel insurance with a well-known brand identity.

name: Hastings Direct
description: Digital-first insurer specialising in competitive car and home insurance, targeting value-conscious UK drivers.

name: More Than
description: Insurance provider offering car, home, pet, and life insurance with a focus on flexible cover options.

name: LV=
description: Mutual insurer offering award-winning car, home, pet, and travel insurance with consistently high customer ratings.

name: Barclays
description: One of the UK's Big Four banks, offering current accounts, savings, credit cards, loans, and mortgages.

name: HSBC
description: Global banking giant with a strong UK presence, offering a full range of personal and business banking products.

name: Lloyds Bank
description: One of the UK's longest-established banks, providing current accounts, credit cards, mortgages, and savings products.

name: NatWest
description: Major UK retail bank offering everyday banking, loans, mortgages, and investment products with digital-first services.

name: Monzo
description: Digital-first challenger bank with a bright coral card, offering fee-free spending abroad, instant notifications, and budgeting tools.

name: Starling Bank
description: Award-winning digital bank offering personal and business accounts with smart budgeting features and no monthly fees.

name: Santander UK
description: Major high street bank offering current accounts with cashback, competitive mortgage rates, and savings products.

name: NOW Broadband
description: Sky-backed broadband provider offering flexible, contract-free broadband with optional NOW TV entertainment passes.

name: Hyperoptic
description: Full fibre broadband provider delivering ultrafast speeds up to 1Gbps directly to homes and apartments across UK cities.

name: Tesco Mobile
description: Supermarket mobile network on O2, offering competitive SIM-only and pay monthly plans with Clubcard perks.

name: Lebara
description: Budget mobile network on Vodafone, specialising in affordable SIM-only plans with international calling bundles.

name: Talkmobile
description: Vodafone-owned budget mobile network offering simple, affordable SIM-only plans with no price rises during your contract.

name: TTfone
description: UK specialist in easy-to-use mobile phones designed for seniors and those who prefer simple, straightforward handsets.
